summary: The diff shows that Navigation.tsx, HeroSection.tsx, and Footer.tsx have all been updated to reference the new logo paths (/assets/generated/CETA-3.png and /assets/generated/HOPE_Logo_0-Photoroom-2.png). The frontend-file-summaries.txt confirms all three components use the new paths. However, the diff shows no ADDED FILES, meaning the actual static asset files (CETA-3.png and HOPE_Logo_0-Photoroom-2.png) under frontend/public/assets/generated/ do not appear to have been added to the repository in this diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Save CETA-3.png and HOPE Logo_0-Photoroom-2.png as static assets under frontend/public/assets/generated/ and reference them from Navigation.tsx, HeroSection.tsx, and Footer.tsx using their respective static asset paths.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows 'ADDED FILES: none' — the actual image files (frontend/public/assets/generated/CETA-3.png and frontend/public/assets/generated/HOPE_Logo_0-Photoroom-2.png) are not present in the diff. The components reference these paths, but the physical asset files do not appear to have been added.
